reviews.review_description: First game I've played for over an hour straight on the vr gear. I was totally immersed in the game from start until finish. The puzzles are fun and get to be pretty difficult.

I have spent more time on this game than any other. Will really test your mind. Works perfect on my G7E . Keep in mind for those that complain about the sound on games ? Bluetooth Headphones as of now will scramble the sound on most games. Get a good pair of wired headphones and enjoy the fun.
Very interesting original game.  Lotsa replay value.  Not super hard at the start but gets harder later.

reviews.review_title: Don’t buy if you want to win quickly.
reviews.review_description: VERY challenging. After 1.1 million points, FINALLY broke the final root - the DARKNET BACKBONE! Didn’t use coding, either. Yeah! Since I play Darknet with the audio off, didn’t hear any woot-woot or bells ring. Fun game.

reviews.review_title: Not sure why this is so addictive!
reviews.review_description: But it is! If ya like puzzle games, you should get this.

This game is fantastic! One small or rather BIG problem. I tried 3 different types of Blu tooth headsets and none of them worked. I am on a galaxy s7. I even tried it on a note 5. No luck. But...buy you some little 1.99 head buds and plug in! You won't want to put it down!

I was wanting to buy another game besides this one and I notice many bad reviews on most games.  I love this game so I thought I would see what people say about it, and surprise, more bad reviews. This is a puzzle kind of game where you have to beat the board by the time the timer runs out, which is anywhere from 13 - 30 minutes. This was my first VR game experience and I loved it.  Cool little effects while you play.  Go through a wormhole and leave one planet for another (that's what it looks like, I'm sure others would agrree).  Very fun and addictive game. I'd recommend it for all people new to VR who enjoy a good time based puzzle where you have to be quick. And after you select a mission...say..you choose to hack the CIA, and you succeed. If you read the message board afterwards it will tell you of some evil conspiracy the CIA was up to and you put out into the public by hacking their system.  Just a bunch of fun small things that add up to a real fun time passer.  It's only 10 bucks and I've gotten hours and hours of fun out. If 10 dollars ain't a big deal to you, and looking for something fun, try this.

What a great game this is , only problem is there are not enough hours in the day to play it .
My favourite game on  the oculus go.
Really great game but I always swipe the wrong way to move the display which irritates me no end. Not sure why but it does not seem intuitive.

It's simple enough to understand in a few minutes, but has enough depth to challenge you for years. Much like Go and Chess, but with a Cyberpunk twist. This just *works* on the Oculus Go. Well made and fairly pretty also. I give it full points (and I'm pretty stingy when it comes to giving out stars) ;)
hell yes.
Very different from any puzzle game I’ve ever played. A little addictive.
Simple to understand, and can make you sit there for five minutes to think of a plan.

This game is a must have for gear VR. The graphics and gameplay are stunning! Hours of fun and the sense of being inside of a network is beyond words. Great job and please continue to make us content like this!
I play this more than any other app.  Practically every day. It never gets old!  It can be as easy or as challenging as you want because you can choose the difficulty level each time you play.
Love this game, works well on the Go platform. Excellent Tron/cyberspace feel
love it!

reviews.review_title: pretty fun but can see it getting old
reviews.review_description:
so far I could see this being a mobile game and don't see the VR medium adding much. same with Tactera  by the same maker.  For a game where VR changes everything, i think of superhot or beat saber.
If i had an hour to try the game, i probably would have refunded it
A very fun game .. one of the best for Go
I like it but the sound is nothing but glitchy I wouldn't complain but I paid for it
